station_deck.name: Lookout Station
station_deck.purpose: Spot surface disturbance, birds, slicks, and anything that breaks the horizon.

station_deck.name: Echo Station
station_deck.purpose: Track the deep shape under the boat and call out any moving mass below.

station_deck.name: Lure Station
station_deck.purpose: Deploy bait lights, sound, and drift markers to tempt the monster into view.

station_deck.name: Net Station
station_deck.purpose: Ready barriers, lines, and a safe fallback route if the contact surges.

station_deck.name: Recovery Station
station_deck.purpose: Handle damage, injuries, and the story that comes back with the crew.

evidence.detail: Adventure Stations established for a bounded sea-monster hunt scenario.
Lookout, Echo, Lure, Net, and Recovery stations assigned.
A slow-moving shape was seen under the swell; no hostile action detected.
